scope: Expose `agenc providers` readiness for BYOK credentials, local provider health, and AgenC subscription-backed managed keys

rows.source: local provider client startup checks plus AgenC auth/key configuration
requiredBehaviors: list every built-in provider and its default model
show whether each provider is currently usable
show BYOK key presence and the relevant provider key env var
show the active auth backend and subscription tier
emit text and JSON output without booting a model session
edgeCases: remote paid subscription can use managed keys
managed key vending failure makes a hosted provider unusable
empty or mismatched managed key responses are rejected
hosted AgenC routing requires a paid subscription
hosted AgenC routing verifies model inference and inferred-provider key vending

requiredBehaviors: probe Ollama through the native `/api/tags` endpoint
probe LM Studio through its `/models` endpoint
surface failed local probes as unusable provider rows
edgeCases: local server returns a non-2xx status
key-backed local endpoints receive bearer auth on the probe
